column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/nis2` extension <-> NIST Cybersecurity Framework v2 alignment. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) - the NIS2 schema in DPV 2.3 is intentionally small (incident-notification reports, mitigation advice, compliance status) and maps to the Respond (RS) and Recover (RC) functions of CSF 2.0. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
